title: Support dist and solve...before inside foreach constraints (#7245)

features.name: dist constraint inside foreach loop
features.description: Code should include a dist constraint inside a foreach constraint block where dist weight variables are indexed by the foreach loop variable

features.name: solve before constraint inside foreach loop
features.description: Code should include a solve...before ordering constraint inside a foreach constraint block to specify per-element solve ordering after foreach unrolling

features.name: solve before with unpacked struct array member path
features.description: Code should include a solve...before constraint with an unpacked struct array member path like cfg[i].w where w is an unpacked struct member
